## Summary

Describe the change in plain language.

## Why This Change

Explain what problem this solves or what launch goal it supports.

## Pages And Files Touched

List the pages, assets, or docs changed in this PR.

## QA Checklist

- [ ] Reviewed locally in a browser
- [ ] Checked mobile layout
- [ ] Checked desktop layout
- [ ] Verified internal links if navigation changed
- [ ] Confirmed no placeholder content was introduced
- [ ] Updated docs if workflow or scope changed

## Launch Impact

- [ ] No launch blocker
- [ ] Affects contact or intake flow
- [ ] Affects group participation flow
- [ ] Affects trust or team content
- [ ] Affects hosting, deployment, or DNS

## Follow-Up

List any follow-up work, or write `None`.
